data.speaker: researcher
data.text: Today, Apple is proud to report $111.2 billion in revenue, up 17 percent from a year ago,

data.thesis: AAPL prints a record March quarter: revenue $111.2B (+17%) above guidance despite supply constraints, an iPhone March-quarter record on 22% growth, an all-time Services record (+16%), and EPS of $2.01 (+22%) — with double-digit growth in every geography including strong Greater China and India.
